underlying_goal: Fix file preview system (larger/fullscreen previews, custom download filenames, original filename display), fix upload component text truncation, and sync documentation before project pause
friction_detail: Text truncation in upload components failed to resolve after 3+ CSS-based attempts (deep, inline, global, repositioning); backend Chinese-path encoding caused file not found error
brief_summary: User wanted file preview improvements, custom download filenames, and upload UI fixes; fullscreen preview and FileInfo DTO were successful but text truncation remained unresolved despite multiple CSS attempts
